stemHtml: On a Fly-By-Wire aircraft equipped with sidesticks, if the First Officer has locked the Captain out of the controls, how can the Captain regain control?

options.a: By telling the First Officer to release the sidestick.
options.b: By pressing and holding the takeover button.
options.c: By asking the First Officer to press the takeover button.
options.d: Via manual override through a specific cockpit procedure.
